title: Senior Frontend Engineer
clientLine: Series B payments · product-led
equityNote: Benchmarked to US fintech; meaningful equity on a standard four-year schedule.
companyTagline: Modern payment infrastructure for product-led growth teams.
whoYouAre: 5+ years shipping production web apps with React and TypeScript.
Comfortable owning design systems, performance budgets, and accessibility.
You collaborate closely with design and product—not a ticket factory.
Experience with SSR frameworks and edge deployment patterns.
You write tests where they buy confidence: integration over vanity coverage.
desirable: You’ve worked in high-traffic consumer or B2B checkout flows.
Familiarity with observability (Datadog, Sentry) and CI for frontends.
whatJobInvolves: Lead feature work on the merchant dashboard and embedded components.
Partner with platform on shared UI libraries and rollout strategy.
Mentor mid-level engineers through code review and pairing.
First 90 days: ship a measurable uplift in LCP on core journeys.

insights.growthStat: 18% employee growth in 12 months

companyBenefits: Health, dental, vision; mental health stipend.
ourTake: Northbeam is carving out a niche in developer-friendly payments APIs. The team ships quickly, invests in design quality, and has room for a senior IC to shape the product surface without layers of process.

title: Staff Platform Engineer
clientLine: Infrastructure org · Rust & K8s
equityNote: Includes annual bonus band; EMI options discussed at offer.
companyTagline: Control plane for multi-cloud fleets at scale.
whoYouAre: Deep experience building reliable distributed systems in Rust or Go.
You’ve operated large Kubernetes estates and care about SLOs.
Comfortable leading technical direction without people management.
Pragmatic about trade-offs: boring tech where it counts, sharp edges where it wins.
desirable: Background in networking or storage platforms.
Open-source contributions welcome.
whatJobInvolves: Own core services for cluster lifecycle and upgrades.
Drive incident reviews and reliability initiatives.
Collaborate with security on hardening and compliance paths.

insights.growthStat: 23% employee growth in 12 months

companyBenefits: Private medical; pension with employer contribution.
ourTake: Relayforge is in a crowded market but differentiated on operator UX. The platform team is small and senior—expect high ownership and crisp communication with customers.

title: ML Engineer — Inference
clientLine: Applied AI · low-latency serving
equityNote: Equity band competitive with top decile ML infra startups.
companyTagline: Inference stack for production GenAI workloads.
whoYouAre: You’ve shipped model serving paths where latency and cost matter.
Strong Python; comfortable profiling C++/CUDA hot paths.
Experience batching, quantization, and dynamic routing.
desirable: Published work or OSS in ML systems is a plus.
whatJobInvolves: Optimize serving pipelines for enterprise SLAs.
Work with research to productize new model families.
Partner with infra on autoscaling and capacity planning.

insights.growthStat: 31% employee growth in 12 months

companyBenefits: GPU credits for side experiments (within policy).
ourTake: Lattice is betting on bespoke inference stacks over generic APIs. The role suits someone who wants hard performance problems and direct customer exposure.

title: Security Engineer (AppSec)
clientLine: Enterprise SaaS · FedRAMP path
equityNote: Annual bonus target 10%; equity for senior hires.
companyTagline: Identity and access for regulated industries.
whoYouAre: Experience threat modeling web apps and APIs in production.
Comfortable reviewing code across languages.
You’ve supported SOC2 / ISO programs hands-on.
desirable: FedRAMP or public-sector exposure is a plus.
whatJobInvolves: Lead AppSec reviews for new features.
Automate SAST/DAST in CI with pragmatic guardrails.
Partner with GRC on customer audits.

insights.growthStat: 9% employee growth in 12 months

companyBenefits: Four-day summer Fridays in July & August.
ourTake: Vaultline is past the chaos of early startup mode—process exists, but security still has a seat at the table for roadmap calls.

title: Engineering Manager · Data
clientLine: Growth-stage marketplace
equityNote: Bonus eligible; equity refresh reviewed annually.
companyTagline: Discovery and trust for two-sided marketplaces.
whoYouAre: You’ve managed teams of 4–8 engineers in data or backend.
Strong stakeholder skills with analytics and product.
Comfortable hiring and developing ICs.
desirable: Experience with experimentation platforms.
whatJobInvolves: Own the data platform roadmap with peer EM on product eng.
Improve reliability and cost of batch + streaming pipelines.
Partner with finance on revenue metrics integrity.

insights.growthStat: 14% employee growth in 12 months

ourTake: Cartograph is balancing marketplace liquidity with trust & safety investments—the data org is central to that story.

title: Developer Experience Lead
clientLine: Platform team · IDP & tooling
equityNote: Contract role; extension likely based on roadmap.
companyTagline: Internal developer platforms for modern engineering orgs.
whoYouAre: You’ve rolled out IDPs or golden paths at scale.
Strong communicator—writing docs is part of the job.
Comfortable facilitating across security, SRE, and app teams.
desirable: Experience with service catalog and scorecards.
whatJobInvolves: Define DX roadmap for 400+ engineers.
Drive adoption metrics for templates and paved roads.
Work with leadership on vendor strategy.

insights.growthStat: 11% contractor & FTE growth in 12 months

companyBenefits: Competitive day rate; option to convert FTE.
ourTake: Stacksmith is doubling down on developer experience as a retention lever—this contract is visible to VPE and CTO.

whatJobInvolves: Partner with TechRecruit on scope and success metrics.

title: Senior Java Software Engineer
clientLine: We are well established with mature products and some of the largest names in digital assets and traditional finance on our client list.
companyTagline: Enables seamless connectivity across digital asset exchanges and on-chain protocols, offering a detailed real-time view of all your exposures and risks.
whoYouAre: Experienced Java Software Engineer with 5 to 10 years of experience
Strong background in Java development
Experience with front-end technologies like React and JavaScript
Expertise in working with databases
Excellent communication and teamwork skills
Educated to degree level in a numerate discipline is preferable
Open to new ideas and a quick learner with an ambitious and results-driven personality
desirable: Experience in financial systems, trading platforms, or high-frequency data processing
Experience building connectivity and working with APIs (REST/Websockets/FIX)
whatJobInvolves: Developing connectivity to various cryptocurrency exchanges
Implementing critical features across the Haruko suite of products
Supporting Asia based clients
Designing, developing, and optimizing scalable applications
Working closely with cross-functional teams
Honing and developing skills across different technologies and business lines

insights.growthStat: Recognized as 'Best Solution Provider' in Hedge Week APAC Digital Assets awards and 'Most Innovative Technology Firm' by HFM since expanding into Asia in 2023.

companyBenefits: Opportunity to work on cutting-edge financial and trading technologies
Work in a start-up like environment within a well-established organisation
Dedicated learning budget to expand skillset
Modern location in the City in London with high spec development machines
ourTake: A unique opportunity to join one of the leading engineering teams in the blockchain industry working on green field products in a well-established, rapidly growing organisation.

Knowledge of government and credit bonds
Mentoring junior developers
Experience with test automation and DevOps
whatJobInvolves: Full software development lifecycle from analysis to post-rollout support

Implementing new features and enhancements
Reviewing code and mentoring junior team members
Supporting production rollout and SL3 support

insights.growthStat: Deutsche Bank continues to invest heavily in technology to maintain its competitive edge in electronic trading.

companyBenefits: 30 days holiday plus bank holidays with option to purchase more
